title: Tributary Area Load Distribution
description: Calculates tributary loads and performs beam analysis.

length.description: Length. Symbol: l. Units: m. Length of section.

width.description: Width. Symbol: b. Units: m. Width of section.

load_type.description: Load Type. Symbol: Type. Select between one-way or two-way load distribution.

total_load.description: Pressure Magnitude. Symbol: q_t. Units: kPa. Magnitude of the area load (pressure).

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
